## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new talent team members to GrowthX's hiring process and tools, focusing on the AI-assisted candidate screening system.](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses a custom AI-powered system integrated with Workable ATS to efficiently screen high volumes of applicants](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [The system generates job expectations, interview questions, and candidate assessments based on job descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [New talent team members (Marília and Tucker) are getting onboarded and will have input on optimizing the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [The team is open to exploring other ATS options like Greenhouse for future scaling](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)

## Topics

### Current Hiring Process Overview

  - [Uses Workable ATS integrated with custom AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [Job postings generate expectations documents and interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [AI screens resumes and application answers, ranking candidates](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Video interviews conducted through Hirevue for transcript analysis](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [High application volume (e.g., 700+ for content writer role) necessitates AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

### AI-Assisted Screening System

  - [Generates job expectations from descriptions (e.g., qualifications, skills)](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Creates evaluation rubrics for resume analysis and interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Ranks candidates automatically in Workable (stars, thumbs up)](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Provides AI assessment explanations for each candidate](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Posts top candidates to dedicated Slack channels](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

### New Team Member Onboarding

  - [Marília: Day 3, still getting up to speed but positive experience so far](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Tucker: Part-time (2-3 hours/day) until April 7th, focusing on understanding the business](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

### Potential Process Improvements

  - [Exploring other ATS options (e.g., Greenhouse) for better scaling and features](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Customizing AI prompts and evaluation criteria for specific roles](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Considering removal of video interview step if deemed unnecessary](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Open to adjusting the process based on new team members' expertise](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)

### Office Space Update

  - [Team looking at new office space for events and local team collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [First floor for events/meetups, second floor for 10-15 desks](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Current office becoming too expensive ($25k for small space)](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to create detailed written tutorial on the hiring process and AI system](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Investigate pricing and features of Greenhouse ATS as a potential alternative](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [Tucker to connect with Quantum Talent to streamline candidate sharing process](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)
  - [Marília to gain hands-on experience with Workable and current hiring workflow](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Team to continually assess and optimize the hiring process based on new insights and needs](https://fathom.video/share/EourZJyDzQSXvik4oEMdsFhkyQWnxeeh?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
